title: Webhooks + Integrations deep test

summary.blocking_issue: Supabase tables webhook_endpoints / api_keys missing or PostgREST insert/upsert failures; fallback handlers registered AFTER real handlers shadow only GET routes (return empty []) but POST/PATCH/DELETE/test/deliveries fall through to real handlers and return 500 'internal'.

T1_POST.cause: supabaseRequest POST /webhook_endpoints likely 4xx (table missing or RLS); error swallowed

T2_GET.note: fallback returns {ok:true,webhooks:[]} — masking not exercised because no rows

T3_PATCH_revoke.note: handler does not whitelist revoked_at field

T4_whoami_with_key.note: no real key created (T1 failed); cannot verify

T5_read_scope_POST.note: invalid_api_key short-circuits before scope check; no valid read-only key available

T1_sale_created.got: sale created id=7c7f9b2f, no endpoints registered (T1 fail) so dispatchWebhook iterates empty target list

T2_customer_created.got: customer in-memory fallback warning; dispatch path not exercised

T3_HMAC.got: code path verified in api/index.js _deliverWithRetry uses crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret)

T5_retry_exponential.got: code path: WEBHOOK_MAX_ATTEMPTS=3 with Math.pow(2, attempt-1)*1000 backoff confirmed in source

code_findings.issue: registerFallbacks() runs after main routes; only GET endpoints overridden, mutation routes still hit Supabase and 500 because tables webhook_endpoints, webhook_deliveries, api_keys are absent
code_findings.hmac_signing: verified present: crypto.createHmac('sha256', ep.secret) header X-Volvix-Signature

next_actions: Create supabase tables webhook_endpoints, webhook_deliveries, api_keys (with tenant_id, scopes jsonb, hashed_key, revoked_at)
Wrap supabaseRequest errors in webhook handlers to return informative body instead of generic 500
Re-test full CRUD once tables exist
final_status: RED — webhooks/integrations not production-ready: persistence layer (Supabase tables) missing
